skills.name: magic-recorder
skills.purpose: Turn rough spoken notes, transcripts, and Get note materials into structured Markdown thinking records.

external_dependencies.name: Get note OpenAPI / official Skill
external_dependencies.when: Used when input comes from a Get note link, latest note request, note id, title, date, or keyword.

external_dependencies.name: Local Markdown workspace
external_dependencies.when: Used when saving the cleaned thinking record.

skills.name: magic-kb-compiler
skills.purpose: Compile raw notes, Get notes, clippings, AI chat records, and practice notes into Magic AI knowledge assets.

external_dependencies.name: Get note OpenAPI / official Skill
external_dependencies.when: Used when the source is a Get note share URL or private Get note record.

external_dependencies.name: Obsidian / Magic AI knowledge base
external_dependencies.when: Used as the full local target for raw sources, cards, wiki pages, views, and compile logs.

external_dependencies.name: ima
external_dependencies.when: Used as a knowledge-base target by exporting Markdown, source summaries, topic entries, or import packages.

skills.name: magic-wechat
skills.purpose: Publish 神奇桑桑's WeChat Official Account articles: fixed layout (profile card + orange section dividers + fixed footer), local pure-text cover with a commercial-safe font (2.35:1, compatible with 1:1 Moments crop), and save a draft with auto-settable options (comments on / fans-only comments / source URL).

external_dependencies.name: WeChat Official Account API (draft/add, material/add_material)
external_dependencies.when: Upload cover and save article draft.

external_dependencies.name: Alibaba PuHuiTi font (commercial-free)
external_dependencies.when: Rendering the text cover in build_cover.py.

derived_from.name: baoyu-post-to-wechat
derived_from.author: 宝玉 (Baoyu)
derived_from.note: 公众号发布思路来源；本 skill 的 publish.py 为自建实现（微信官方 draft/add API），不含原 skill 源码。

excluded: Get note official skill or OpenAPI adapter
